name: One delivery option is pre-selected by default
scenarioId: delivery_options:One delivery option is pre-selected by default
methodName: One delivery option is pre-selected by default

testSteps.description: Given the shopper has navigated to a product detail page

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: Then the delivery section should be visible
And one delivery option should be selected by default

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to choose a delivery option for a product
  So that I can select the shipping method that suits me

title: One delivery option is pre-selected by default
